title: Terminology Cleanup — PIVOT → CORRELATION
description: Rename all user-visible 'PIVOT FINDINGS' labels to 'CORRELATION FINDINGS'. Rename evaluate_pivot function/module to evaluate_correlation. Remove stale pivot wording from CLI output.
acceptance_criteria: rt analyse output section header is 'CORRELATION FINDINGS' not 'PIVOT FINDINGS'
No user-visible string in CLI output contains 'PIVOT FINDINGS'
Integration test asserts CORRELATION FINDINGS appears in rt analyse output
